name: 骷髅匕首（★） | 狩猎网格
nameZh: 骷髅匕首（★） | 狩猎网格
descriptionEn: This skeletonized-tang knife has been taped at the handle for improved grip. The hole allows a finger to be threaded through for stability and safety. It has been spray-painted using mesh fencing and cardboard cutouts as stencils. A predator is a predator, no matter the environment
descriptionZh: 这把镂空的匕首被绑在握把上以提升握感。刀身上的空洞允许手指伸过以提升稳定性与安全性。 这把武器以围住的网格和纸板切口为漏字板进行了喷漆。 不管环境怎么变，弱肉强食的法则永远不会改变
